name: Sulja Bros Building Supplies Ltd.
summary: Sulja Bros. Building Supplies, Ltd. distributes building materials. It offers lumber, roofing products, glass and building material systems, drywall and drywall compounds, trim, shingles, and joint treatment products. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Harrow, Canada. Sulja Bros. Building Supplies, Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Consultech Construction Management, Inc.
